title: helianthemum marifolium subsp. andalusicum
intro: Helianthemum marifolium subsp. andalusicum is a subspecies of the Rockrose plant, native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum marifolium subsp. andalusicum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or made into a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
